svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="全链路数据流" id="dataflow"> <mxGraphModel dx="-474" dy="-194" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="520" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="A" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="前端层
Vue3 + Nuxt.js" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="40" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="B" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="BFF 层
Egg.js / Express" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="260" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="后端层
Java + SpringBoot" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="480" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="D" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="数据层
MySQL + Redis" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="140" x="720" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#5eead4;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=12;" value="用户交互
数据渲染 / 状态管理" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="40" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="AB" edge="1" parent="1" source="A" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="B" value="数据请求"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BC" edge="1" parent="1" source="B" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="C" value="接口转发 / 聚合"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CD" edge="1" parent="1" source="C" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="D" value="数据操作"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="DC" edge="1" parent="1" source="D" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="C" value="数据返回"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CB" edge="1" parent="1" source="C" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="B" value="结果处理"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BA" edge="1" parent="1" source="B" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="A" value="数据格式化"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="AE" edge="1" parent="1" source="A" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="E" value="数据渲染 / 状态管理"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LEGEND" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;" value="请求链路：实线灰箭头 返回链路：经 BFF 格式化后渲染给用户 用户交互：青绿旁路" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="820" x="40" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
